description: A graphic formatted as a screenshot of a Truth Social or Twitter-style post by Donald J. Trump. The top-left shows a circular avatar of Trump's face painted in American-flag colors (blue with white stars and red and white stripes), beside the bold name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verified badge and the small black Truth Social square logo, and the grey handle '@realDonaldTrump' below. The body is black sans-serif text on a white background reading verbatim: 'GOOD RIDDANCE! After 15 years of Dumocrats promising that "Climate Change" is going to destroy the Planet, the United Nations TOP Climate Committee just admitted that its own projections (RCP8.5) were WRONG! WRONG! WRONG! For far too long Climate Activism has been used by Dumocrats to scare Americans, push horrible Energy Polices, and fund BILLIONS into their bogus research programs. Unlike the Dumocrats, who use Climate Alarmism nonsense to push their GREEN NEW SCAM, my Administration will always be based on TRUTH, SCIENCE, and FACT! President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: GOOD RIDDANCE! ... the United Nations TOP Climate Committee just admitted that its own projections (RCP8.5) were WRONG! WRONG! WRONG! ... GREEN NEW SCAM ... TRUTH, SCIENCE, and FACT!
